pre_game.message: Hey H, I'm G — nice to meet you. Excited for the game; what made you sign up?
Hey G — I’m hoping to win some cash to pay off a looming loan and help the people I care about, figured this game’s my best shot.
I hear you — I’m here to win for my people too; what’s your plan or strategy going into the game?
I plan to read people and build a couple of quiet alliances — stay low-profile, learn who’s trustworthy, and strike when the right split appears so I can walk out with enough to cover that loan.
Smart plan — I’m keeping low too but I like calculated risks; want to quietly watch each other and team up if the right split appears?
I’m in — let’s keep low, swap quick impressions, and only commit to a split that gets me enough to pay the loan; a discreet nod can be our signal.
Discreet nod sounds good — I’ll watch for quiet, trustworthy players too; we’ll only commit if the split gets you (and me) what we need.
Sounds perfect — discreet nod it is. My goal’s $25k to clear the loan; what number do you need so we know the minimum split to accept?
I need about $20k — so let’s only accept splits that net me at least $20,000.
Got it — I need $25k, so let’s only accept splits that net you $20k and me $25k (so total at least $45k); I’m in.
That makes sense — $45k minimum works for me; we stick to the discreet nod and only take a split that guarantees those amounts.
Sounds good — let’s watch quietly for any split ≥$45k and use the discreet nod when it’s safe.
Sounds like a plan — I’ll watch for any split ≥$45k and give the discreet nod when it’s safe. Stay low and I’ll cover my side.
Appreciate it — I’ll stay low too; watch for your nod and I’ll mirror it when I see a safe ≥$45k split.
Perfect — I’ll nod when I see a safe ≥$45k; mirror me and we’ll take it. Stay sharp.
Got it — I’ll mirror your nod and only take a split that nets us our amounts; stay sharp.
Perfect — I’ll stay sharp and nod when I see a safe at-least-$45k split; we’ve got this.
Got it — I’ll be ready to mirror your nod when a ≥$45k split appears. Stay sharp.
Got it — I’ll be watching closely too; nod when you see a safe ≥$45k and I’ll mirror you. We’ve got this.
Sounds good — I’ll nod when I see a safe ≥$45k and mirror you; we’ve got this.
Got it — I’ll mirror your nod when I see a ≥$45k split; stay sharp.
